title: stelis remifolia
intro: Stelis remifolia is a species of orchid, commonly known as the deer antler orchid, native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and kill bacteria. The health benefits of Stelis remifolia include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Stelis remifolia is typically prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
